EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to change attributes of user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} removed user "{object.value}" from user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} failed to make users "{object.new_value}" members of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} failed to remove user "{object.value}" from user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}

The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to remove user "{object.value}" from user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} assigned users "{object.new_value}" as administrators of user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} added user "{object.new_value}" to user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} assigned users "{object.new_value}" as administrators of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} failed to add user "{object.new_value}" to user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} failed to assign users "{object.new_value}" as administrators of user group "{"root"}" on host {event_src.host}
The account of user {subject.account.name} was verified for validity when the user was logging in to the system on host {event_src.host}
The account of user {subject.account.name} was verified for validity when the user was escalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
Failed to verify the account of user {subject.account.name} for validity when the user was escalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} made users "{object.new_value}" members of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} reset the counter of failed login attempts for user "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} added user "{object.new_value}" to user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} is changing attributes of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}

Failed to verify the account of user "{object.account.name}" for validity when the user was escalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
